aeo_readiness.summary: NGEN Services has potential to be cited by AI assistants but currently lacks the structured content and authority signals needed for consistent AI recommendations.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide AI models with structured business details.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly audit citations to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Kissimmee' and 'AC installation near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-related questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, NGEN Services misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and FAQ content consistently appear in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make NGEN Services the go-to HVAC expert in AI search.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make NGEN Services the top choice in AI search results.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI assistants and boost your lead generation.
